> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a51700.html

Represents a datum csys builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetWaveLinkInformation(out string info, out bool xformExists, outNXOpen.Point3dxformOrigin, outNXOpen.Matrix3x3xformOrientation, out double xformScale)` | `unsafe void` | Prints wave browser type information about linkMore... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `ComponentsCreation[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag of the Datum Csys components creationMore... |
| `Csys[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CartesianCoordinateSystem` | Returns or sets the CSYS that defines a Datum CSYSMore... |
| `DisplayScaleFactor[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the scale factor of the input Datum CsysMore... |
| `FixedSizeDatum[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the fixed size flag of a created Datum CsysMore... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `SetPointOnCurve(double arcLength, string constraint,NXOpen.Features.DatumPlaneBuilder.CurveOptionoption,NXOpen.ICurvecurve,NXOpen.DisplayableObjectsecondGeometry)` | `unsafe void` | Sets curve or edge object and arc length with other geometry selected.More... |
| `SetThreePoints(NXOpen.Pointpoint1,NXOpen.Pointpoint2,NXOpen.Pointpoint3,NXOpen.Features.DatumPlaneBuilder.UseArcLengthuseArcLength)` | `unsafe void` | Sets three different points.More... |
| `UpdateFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Update the feature if the feature does not exist then create itMore... |

| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |

| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `BlendCollector[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the blend collector holding the blends to deleteMore... |
| `CapFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectISurface` | Returns the face or plane to be used as cap face.More... |
| `CapOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DeleteFaceBuilder.CapOptionValues` | Returns or sets the cap option.More... |

| `FaceCollector[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the face collector holding the faces to delete, don't use it until nx502More... |
| `FaceEdgeBlendPreference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DeleteFaceBuilder.FaceEdgeBlendPreferenceOptions` | Returns or sets the preference option indicating wether to delete undetermined blend chain as notch chain or as cliff chainMore... |
| `FaceRecognized[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.FaceRecognitionBuilder` | Returns the faces recognized for deletion.More... |
| `Heal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag specifying whether to heal the body while deleting its face.More... |
| `HealPlanar[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag of finding a plane in which all edges of a hole lie and attach this to a face covering the hole during heal hole process, don't use it until further notificationMore... |
| `MaxBlendRadius[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximal radius of deleted blends, only for delete blend typeMore... |
| `MaxHoleDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximal diameter of deleted holes, only for delete hole type and only working when use_hole_diameter is true, don't use it until nx502More... |
| `Setback[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DeleteFaceBuilder.SetbackOptions` | Returns or sets the set back options.More... |
| `SpecifyBlend[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag of treating all input faces as blend, don't use it until further notificationMore... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DeleteFaceBuilder.SelectTypes` | Returns or sets the delete face type, don't use it until nx502More... |
| `UseHoleDiameter[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag of using hole diameter to filter hole or not, only for delete hole type and the max hole diameter should be set if it is true, don't use it until nx502More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetDimension()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Annotations.Dimension` | The drafting dimension which is used as UI tool for dimension display.More... |
| `OnApplyPre()` | `unsafe void` | Delete the current operation and close the interaction for previewMore... |
| `Reconfigure()` | `unsafe void` | Reset the operation and configure it again, if something is changed and a re-configure is needed, this function should be calledMore... |
| `SetSolveOption(NXOpen.Features.AdmBaseBuilder.SolveOptionTypesolveOption)` | `unsafe void` | Sets solve option to use C1 or C2 for VTK solverMore... |
| `SetUpdateMethod(NXOpen.Features.AdmBaseBuilder.UpdateMethodTypeupdateMethod)` | `unsafe void` | Sets VTK update method to for Solid EdgeMore... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.DraftBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a51816.html

Represents a Draft Feature Builder that creates or edits a draft (Old name Taper) feature

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `SetVariableAngleOption()` | `unsafe void` | Sets the Variable Angle optionMore... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the angle tolerance in [rad/deg]More... |
| `Direction[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the smart direction for draftMore... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the distance tolerance in [in/mm]More... |
| `DraftAllInstances[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option "Draft all instances" [true/false]More... |
| `DraftBothSides[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to draft on both sides of the referenceMore... |
| `DraftIsoclineOrTruedraft[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DraftBuilder.Method` | Returns or sets the Draft methodMore... |
| `DraftReferencesMethod[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DraftBuilder.DraftReferencesMethods` | Returns or sets the draft references methodMore... |
| `EdgeSetAngleExpressionList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ExpressionCollectorSetList` | Returns the list of draft edges SC Collectors and corresponding draft angles.More... |
| `FaceSetAngleExpressionList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ExpressionCollectorSetList` | Returns the list of draft faces SC Collectors and corresponding draft angles.More... |
| `PartingReference[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the parting reference as SC Collector containing only faces or only one datum plane or only one point.More... |
| `StationaryEntity[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns or sets the stationary entity for draft.More... |
| `StationaryPartingReference[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the stationary parting reference as SC Collector containing only faces or only one datum plane or only one point Note that DraftBuilder.More... |
| `StationaryReference[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the stationary reference as SC Collector containing only faces or only one datum plane or only one pointMore... |
| `SymmetricAngle[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether draft angles on both sides of the parting reference are symmetricMore... |
| `TwoDimensionFaceSetsData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.TwoExpressionsCollectorSetList` | Returns the list of draft faces SC Collectors and corresponding draft angles above and below the parting reference.More... |
| `TypeOfDraft[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.DraftBuilder.Type` | Returns or sets the Draft typeMore... |
| `VariableAngleData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.DraftVariableAngleData` | Returns the Data object for Variable Angle DraftMore... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.FaceBlendBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52064.html

Represents a face blend builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetLimitPlanes(outNXOpen.PlanestartLimitPlane, outNXOpen.PlaneendLimitPlane)` | `unsafe void` | This function is to get limit planes for a face blend feature.More... |
| `SetLimitPlanes(NXOpen.PlanestartLimitPlane,NXOpen.PlaneendLimitPlane)` | `unsafe void` | This function is to set limit planes for a face blend feature.More... |
| `UpdateConstantLawProfiles()` | `unsafe void` | Updates all the constant law parms in the builder using builder section.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.FeatureBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52088.html

Represents a Feature Builder to be used in the creation and modification of features

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

Represents the Feature Color Manager class

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetAssignColorToNewFeature()` | `unsafe bool` | Gets state of assign color to newly created featuresMore... |
| `GetColorForNewFeature()` | `unsafe int` | Gets a color that will be applied to newly created featureMore... |
| `RemoveFeatureColor(NXOpen.Features.Featurefeature)` | `unsafe void` | Removes feature color and applies default feature color.More... |
| `SetAssignColorToNewFeature(bool assignColor)` | `unsafe void` | Starts or stops assigning color to newly created featuresMore... |
| `SetColorForNewFeature(int color)` | `unsafe void` | Sets a color that will be applied to newly created featureMore... |
| `SetFeatureColor(NXOpen.NXColorcolor,NXOpen.Features.Featurefeature)` | `unsafe void` | Assigns feature color.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `GetFeatureColorManager(NXOpen.Sessionowner)` | `staticFeatureColorManager` | Returns the FeatureColorManager object for the running session which serves as the 'gateway' class for the application API.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.FlatteningAndFormingBuilderEx

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52224.html

This class will provide the solution to unwrap 3D non-planar, curved geometry to a 2D plane

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `Accuracy[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.FlatteningAndFormingBuilderEx.AccuracyOptions` | Returns or sets the accuracyMore... |
| `AuxiliaryFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the auxiliary faces that will be used to calculate the mapping of being flattened separatly and then connected to the flattened source facesMore... |
| `ConstraintOptions[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.FlatteningAndFormingBuilderEx.Constraints` | Returns or sets the option to minimize the disturbanceMore... |
| `CutCurves[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the cut curves on or close to the source face can be used to tear the source face along these curvesto reduce the distortion during flatteningMore... |
| `DestinationCoordinateSystem[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.CoordinateSystem` | Returns or sets the coordinate systemMore... |
| `DistortionMapOptions[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.FlatteningAndFormingBuilderEx.DistortionMap` | Returns or sets the option to display the distortion map on the source faces.More... |
| `FixedElementsList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObjectList` | Returns the list of points, curves or edges or faces of the source faces that act as fixed itemsMore... |
| `FlatteningFeature[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObject` | Returns the flattening feature whose unwrapping mapping can be used to replay the unwrap or wrap on other objectsMore... |
| `OuterBoundary[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObject` | Returns the outer boundary of the source face that could have the longest lengthMore... |
| `PreservedCurves[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the curves whose lengths will be preserved after flatteningMore... |
| `ReverseTransformation[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag indicating if the reverse transformation will be used in the opposite directionMore... |
| `SourceDirection[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the source direction determines the orientation of the flattened surface.More... |
| `SourceFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the source faces that will be used to calculate the mapping of being flattenedMore... |
| `SourceOrigin[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the source origin is a point on one of the source face.More... |
| `SourceVDirection[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the secondary direction is the cross product of primary direction and source face normalMore... |
| `TabDetection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates if internal tabbed faces can be shown or not.More... |
| `TransformationObjects[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the transformation objects are additional objects that can be flattened with the same mapping.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.FlatteningAndFormingBuilderEx.Types` | Returns or sets the typeMore... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `SetTipAngle(string tipAngle)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the tip angle of the hole.More... |

| `GetReferenceDirection(outNXOpen.IReferenceAxisreference, outNXOpen.AxisOrientationorientation)` | `unsafe void` | Query/Set a horizontal or vertical reference for the feature.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.Human

Represents a human feature

## NXOpen.Features.HumanBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52460.html

Represents a human feature

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `AddHandShapeLib(string handshapeLib)` | `unsafe void` | Add hand shape libraryMore... |
| `AddPostureLib(string postureLib)` | `unsafe void` | Add posture libraryMore... |
| `CreateHumanH10DialogBuilder()` | `unsafeNXOpen.HumanH10DialogBuilder` | Creates aHumanHandsDialogBuilderMore... |
| `CreateHumanHandsDialogBuilder()` | `unsafeNXOpen.HumanHandsDialogBuilder` | Creates aHumanHandsDialogBuilderMore... |
| `CreateHumanHcpdialogBuilder()` | `unsafeNXOpen.HumanHCPDialogBuilder` | Creates aHumanHCPDialogBuilderMore... |
| `DoUpdate(bool updatePosturePrediction, bool updateReferencePoint, bool updateReachZone)` | `unsafe void` | Update humanMore... |
| `ExportCustomHumanFile(string humanFileName)` | `unsafe void` | Export custom human fileMore... |
| `ExportCustomPostureFile(string postureFileName)` | `unsafe void` | Export custom posture fileMore... |
| `GetBarrierCsys()` | `unsafeNXOpen.CoordinateSystem` | Gets barrier csys for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if there is no barrierMore... |
| `GetBarrierNormal()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Vector3d` | Gets barrier normal dirrection for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if the there is no barrierMore... |
| `GetBarrierPoint()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Gets barrier point for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if there is no barrierMore... |
| `GetBodySiteDisplayFlag(NXOpen.HumanData.EditDisplayBodyPartsbodyPart)` | `unsafe bool` | Get the default body parts site CSYS display flag.More... |
| `GetHandGoalAllowNormal(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafe bool` | Gets the allow normal status of hand goal for active reachMore... |
| `GetHandGoalAllowRotate(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafe bool` | Gets the allow rotate status of hand goal for active reachMore... |
| `GetHandGoalCsys(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafeNXOpen.CoordinateSystem` | Gets hand goal csys for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if the hand goal type is not csysMore... |
| `GetHandGoalOrientation(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafeNXOpen.Matrix3x3` | Gets hand goal orientaion for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if the hand goal type is not hand figure or pointMore... |
| `GetHandGoalPoint(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Gets hand goal point for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if the hand goal type is not pointMore... |
| `GetHandGoalPosition(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Gets hand goal position for active reach, returns a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if the hand goal type is not hand figureMore... |
| `GetHandGoalType(NXOpen.HumanData.SideTypeside)` | `unsafeNXOpen.HumanData.HandGoalType` | Gets hand goal type for active reachMore... |
| `GetPosturePrediction()` | `unsafeNXOpen.HumanPosturePrediction` | Get the posture prediction object from human builder.More... |
| `GetSegmentSitesName()` | `unsafe string []` | Get the segment site name of edit human display.More... |
| `GetStatureData(outNXOpen.HumanData.StatureTypestatureType, out double stature, outNXOpen.HumanData.StatureUnitTypestatureUnit)` | `unsafe void` | Gets human stature dataMore... |
| `GetWeightData(outNXOpen.HumanData.WeightTypeweightType, out double weight, outNXOpen.HumanData.WeightUnitTypeweightUnit)` | `unsafe void` | Gets human weight dataMore... |
| `LoadCustomPostureFile(string postureFileName)` | `unsafe void` | Load custom posture fileMore... |

| `CurveAlignedList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.CurveAlignedListBuilder` | Returns the curve aligned listMore... |
| `FactorToRodDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the ball diameter factor to rod diameterMore... |
| `FilterToolFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces of the boundary body that the dangling rods connected to will be removed from the lattice bodyMore... |
| `IsRandom[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to randomize graph vertices within a specified range and generate some bumps for the lattice body.More... |
| `LatticeType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes` | Returns or sets the type of lattice that is going to be created.More... |
| `LatticeVersion[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.Version` | Returns or sets the lattice behavior version numberMore... |
| `Layers[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of unit cell layers stacked over each other.More... |
| `LockAtBoundary[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to exclude nodes near boundary or base faces from randomization.More... |
| `MaxDeviation[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximum deviation that the vertices of the lattice graph will have.More... |
| `MinimumRodNumber[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the minimum rod number - All lattice portions with a number of rods less than specified will be removed.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset of the conformal lattice from the base face.More... |
| `OptimizationIterations[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the optimization iterationsMore... |
| `OrientationPoint1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the orientation point1 of planar UV mappingMore... |
| `OrientationPoint2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the orientation point2 of planar UV mappingMore... |
| `OutputType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.OutputOption` | Returns or sets the output type enum determines how the voronoi or tetrahedron fill lattice will be created.More... |
| `Parameterization[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.ParameterizationType` | Returns or sets the UV mapping parameterization.More... |
| `PoreSize[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the pore sizeMore... |
| `PushNodesUnderFace[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the PushNodesUnderFace determines whether the nodes created on the surface will be on the surface or pushed underneath the surface.More... |
| `RemeshMode[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.FacetSizeType` | Returns or sets the facet size mode forNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes.SurfaceGraphandNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes.TetrahedronGraphwhenNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.BaseMeshType.RemeshTriangularis set.More... |
| `RemoveDanglingRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to remove dangling rods from the lattice body.More... |
| `RemoveDisconnectedRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to remove small disconnected lattice portions keeping just the largest body.More... |
| `RemoveDisconnectedRods2[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to automatically remove all small disconnected lattice portions with a number of rods less than the specified value.More... |
| `ReverseFaceDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether the conformal lattice will be generated on the other side of the faceMore... |
| `RodDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Fields.ScalarFieldWrapper` | Returns the diameter/thickness scalar field of the rods in the lattice graphMore... |
| `SharpEdgesLockOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.SharpEdgesLockType` | Returns or sets the sharp edges lock type forNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes.SurfaceGraphandNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes.TetrahedronGraphwhenNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.BaseMeshType.RemeshTriangularis set.More... |
| `SnipAtBoundary[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to limit rods exactly at boundary forNXOpen.Features.Lattice2Builder.LatticeTypes.UnitGraph.More... |

| `ContourPoint1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the contour point1 of contour UV mappingMore... |
| `ContourPoint2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the contour point2 of contour UV mappingMore... |
| `ContourPoint3[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the contour point3 of contour UV mappingMore... |
| `ContourPoint4[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the contour point4 of contour UV mappingMore... |
| `EdgeLength[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the edge length of the unit cell bounding box, and effective only when the bounding box is a uniform cubeMore... |
| `FilterToolFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectFaceList` | Returns the faces of the boundary body that the dangling rods connected to will be removed from the lattice bodyMore... |
| `IsRandom[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to randomize graph vertices within a specified range and generate some bumps for the lattice body.More... |
| `IsUniformCube[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether the unit cell bounding box is a uniform cubeMore... |
| `LatticeType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes` | Returns or sets the type of lattice that is going to be created.More... |
| `LatticeVersion[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.Version` | Returns or sets the lattice behavior version numberMore... |
| `Layers[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of unit cell layers stacked over each other.More... |
| `MaxDeviation[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximum deviation that the vertices of the lattice graph will have.More... |
| `MaxEdgeLength[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximum edge length used for re-meshing, to determine the redefinition size for the input triangle meshMore... |
| `MinimumRodNumber[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the minimum rod number - All lattice portions with a number of rods less than specified will be removed.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset of the conformal lattice from the base face.More... |
| `Orientation[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Matrix3x3` | Returns or sets the orientation matrix of unit cell patterning in the lattice creation.More... |
| `OrientationPoint1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the orientation point1 of planar UV mappingMore... |
| `OrientationPoint2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the orientation point2 of planar UV mappingMore... |
| `Origin[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Returns or sets the origin where the unit cell patterning starts in the lattice creationMore... |
| `Parameterization[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.ParameterizationType` | Returns or sets the UV mapping parameterizationMore... |
| `RemeshMode[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.FacetSizeType` | Returns or sets the facet size mode forNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.SurfaceGraphandNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.TetrahedronGraphwhenNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.BaseMeshType.RemeshTriangularis set.More... |
| `RemoveDanglingRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to remove dangling rods from the lattice body.More... |
| `RemoveDisconnectedRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to remove small disconnected lattice portions keeping just the largest body.More... |
| `RemoveDisconnectedRods2[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether to automatically remove all small disconnected lattice portions with a number of rods less than the specified value.More... |
| `ReverseFaceDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether the conformal lattice will be generated on the other side of the faceMore... |
| `RodDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the diameter/thickness of the rods in the lattice graphMore... |
| `SharpEdgesLockOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.SharpEdgesLockType` | Returns or sets the sharp edges lock type forNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.SurfaceGraphandNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.TetrahedronGraphwhenNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.BaseMeshType.RemeshTriangularis set.More... |
| `SizeX[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the size of the unit cell bounding box in x axis, and effective only when the bounding box is not a uniform cubeMore... |
| `SizeY[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the size of the unit cell bounding box in y axis, and effective only when the bounding box is not a uniform cubeMore... |
| `SizeZ[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the size of the unit cell bounding box in z axis, and effective only when the bounding box is not a uniform cubeMore... |
| `Source[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.BaseMeshType` | Returns or sets the source -NXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.BaseMeshTypeforNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.SurfaceGraphandNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.LatticeTypes.TetrahedronGraphonly.More... |
| `SplitCurve[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the split curve of cylindrical UV mappingMore... |
| `TessellationFactor[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tessellation factor of the lattice creation.More... |
| `ThicknessType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.LatticeBuilder.ThicknessTypes` | Returns or sets the method that is used to determine lattice rod thickness.More... |
| `UnitCell[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.UnitCellBuilder` | Returns or sets the Unit Cell BuilderMore... |

## NXOpen.Features.OffsetEmboss

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52952.html

Represents an offset emboss feature


---

## NXOpen.Features.OffsetEmbossBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a52956.html

Represents a builder for an offset emboss feature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the angle tolerance: The maximum allowable angle between the true theoretical sheet and the body created to approximate it.More... |
| `BottomDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the bottom distance(Only for point case): The bottom distance defines the extent of the offset pad from the reference point below the point.More... |
| `CenterLine[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the center line: An existing curve/path on the sheet that defines the full extent of the offset feature required.More... |
| `CenterPoint[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the center point: An existing point on the input sheet body is selected as the reference from which the feature is defined.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the distance tolerance: The maximum allowable distance between the true theoretical sheet and the body created to approximate it.More... |
| `HeightOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the height offset: Distance to offset the input sheet to create the pad.More... |
| `LeftWidth[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the left width: Width of pad to the left of the path curve.More... |
| `ReverseDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the reverse direction: The value of true means that the direction for the feature is reversed from the surface normal of the target body, or the offset emboss will create a pocket.More... |
| `RightWidth[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the right width: Width of pad to the right of the path curve.More... |
| `SideOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the side offset: Offset from pad boundary to define the sidewall draft.More... |
| `Target[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns or sets the target body to offset This defines a sheet body to offset emboss.More... |
| `TopDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the top distance(Only for point case): The top distance defines the extent of the offset pad from the reference point above the point.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.OffsetEmbossBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the center type This defines input types: 0 stands for curve case and 1 stands for point case.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |


---

Represents a builder for a Patch Openings feature

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CreatePathFromOpening(outNXOpen.NXObject[] objectArray, outNXOpen.NXObjectpath)` | `unsafe void` | Create a closed curve (path) from the currently selected opening.More... |
| `FindOpenings(bool filterNoise)` | `unsafe void` | Find all valid openings based upon input faces.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| `CutoutRadius[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the cutout radius, used only when type isFeatures.PatchOpeningsBuilder.Types.JoggleMore... |

| `DividingCurves[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the curves used to divide the opening.More... |
| `Faces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces to form patching boundary.More... |
| `Limits[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Die.DieLimitsBuilder` | Returns the limits to control the span of the patchMore... |
| `Openings[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the edges defining the openings to patch.More... |
| `Output[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.PatchOpeningsBuilder.OutputTypes` | Returns or sets the type of output desired - one feature, multiple features, sewn.More... |
| `ShelfLength[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the shelf length, used only when type isFeatures.PatchOpeningsBuilder.Types.JoggleMore... |
| `ShelfPoint1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the first shelf point, used only when type isFeatures.PatchOpeningsBuilder.Types.JoggleMore... |

| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.PatchOpeningsBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the method used to patch the openingMore... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

Represents a pattern feature

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetAllContainedFeatures()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns all the features contained in this container feature.More... |
| `GetAssociatedBodies()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Body[]` | Returns all the bodies created, modified and split by the container feature's "contained" featuresMore... |
| `GetAssociatedCurvesPointsDatums()` | `unsafeNXOpen.DisplayableObject[]` | Returns all the entities(curves,points and datums) created by the container feature's "contained" featuresMore... |
| `GetAssociatedEdges()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Edge[]` | Returns all the edges created, modified and split by the container feature's "contained" featuresMore... |
| `GetAssociatedFaces()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Face[]` | Returns all the faces created, modified and split by the container feature's "contained" featuresMore... |
| `GetImmediateContainedFeatures()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the Immediate Contained features within the container featureMore... |
| `BreakWaveLink()` | `unsafe bool` | Break Wave Link FeatureMore... |
| `ChangeBooleanType()` | `unsafe void` | Change Boolean TypeMore... |
| `DeleteClueAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all clue alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteHintAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all clue alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteInformationalAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all informational alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteWarningAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all warning alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `GetAllChildren()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns all immediate child features.More... |
| `GetBodies()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Body[]` | Returns the bodies created by the featureMore... |
| `GetChildren()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the immediate child features.More... |
| `GetEdges()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Edge[]` | Returns the edges created by the featureMore... |
| `GetEntities()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | Returns the entities created by a feature that are not Bodies, Faces or Edges.More... |
| `GetExpressions()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression[]` | Returns the expressions created by the feature.More... |
| `GetFaces()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Face[]` | Returns the faces created by the featureMore... |
| `GetFeatureClueHintMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns both clue and hint messages of the feature.More... |
| `GetFeatureClueMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature clue messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureColor()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXColor` | The feature colorMore... |
| `GetFeatureErrorMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature error messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureHintMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature hint messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureInformationalMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature informational messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureName()` | `unsafe string` | Returns the displayed name of the feature.More... |
| `GetFeatureWarningMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature warning messages.More... |
| `GetParents()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the immediate parent features.More... |
| `GetSections()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section[]` | Queries a feature for list of its sections.More... |
| `HideBody()` | `unsafe void` | Hide the body created by the featureMore... |
| `HideParents()` | `unsafe void` | Hide the body created by the parent featureMore... |
| `Highlight()` | `unsafe void` | Highlight the body created by the featureMore... |
| `IsBrowsableFeature()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns true if a feature is browsable.More... |
| `IsOutOfDate()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns true if a feature is out of date.More... |
| `LoadParentPart()` | `unsafe void` | Loads parent part for linked featureMore... |
| `LogDiagnostic(int errorCode, string message,NXOpen.Features.Feature.DiagnosticTypediagnosticType)` | `unsafe void` | Log a diagnostic alert for this featureMore... |
| `MakeCurrentFeature()` | `unsafe void` | Make current featureMore... |
| `MakeSketchExternal()` | `unsafe void` | Make the parent sketch external for reuse by other features.More... |
| `MakeSketchInternal()` | `unsafe void` | Make the parent sketch internal if referenced only by this feature.More... |
| `RemoveForEdit(bool dependent)` | `unsafe void` | Remove all the feature faces before a NoHistory mode edit.More... |
| `RemoveParameters()` | `unsafe void` | Remove Local feature parameters in history free mode.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.PatternFeatureBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a53104.html

Represents aNXOpen.Features.PatternFeaturebuilder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `ClearReferencesToReuse()` | `unsafe void` | Clears all the existing references to reuse so that new references can be addedMore... |
| `RemoveAllClocking()` | `unsafe void` | Removes clocking from (unclocks) all instances of theNXOpen.Features.PatternFeature.More... |
| `SetReferencesToReuse(NXOpen.Features.FeatureinputFeature,NXOpen.NXObject[] referencesFromInputFeatures)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the references or selections from the input features which are to be reused for all instances.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `CreateReferencePattern[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the Create Reference Pattern optionMore... |
| `ExpressionOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.PatternFeatureBuilder.ExpressionTransferOptions` | Returns or sets the expression transfer optionMore... |
| `FeatureList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SelectFeatureList` | Returns the FeaturesMore... |
| `OutputOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.PatternFeatureBuilder.OutputOptions` | Returns or sets the output optionMore... |
| `PatternMethod[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.PatternFeatureBuilder.PatternMethodOptions` | Returns or sets the Pattern methodMore... |
| `PatternService[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.PatternDefinition` | Returns the Pattern definition serviceMore... |
| `ReferencePoint[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the reference pointMore... |
| `ReferencePointService[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.PatternReferencePointServiceBuilder` | Returns the reference point serviceMore... |
| `UseInferredReferencePoint[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets a flag to indicate whether to use reference point inferred from selected feature(s) or not.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.PatternGeometry

Represents a pattern geometry feature

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetAllContainedFeatures()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns all the features contained in this container feature.More... |
| `GetAssociatedBodies()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Body[]` | Returns all the bodies created, modified and split by the container feature's "contained" featuresMore... |

| `DeleteWarningAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all warning alerts from the featuresMore... |

| `GetFaces()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Face[]` | Returns the faces created by the featureMore... |

| `MultipleFaceCollector[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the collector that is used to hold faces.More... |

| `PatternLimitsStartingVValue[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the starting v value of the pattern.More... |

Changes rod diameters of exisiting lattice bodies based on the specified rod diameter

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| `FactorToRodDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the ball diameter factor to rod diameterMore... |
| `IncreaseBallThickness[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option to increase the ball thickness with constantly growing factor towards the bulk facesMore... |
| `IncreaseRodThickness[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option to increase the rod thickness with constantly growing factor towards the bulk facesMore... |
| `LatticeBodies[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the lattice bodies whose diamaeters are to be modified.More... |
| `MaxDistanceFromBulk[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the maximum distance to bulk faces within rods or balls will be increasedMore... |
| `MaxFactorForBallThickness[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the max factor that will be multiplied with ball thickness at bulk facesMore... |
| `MaxFactorForRodThickness[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the max factor that will be multiplied with rod thickness at bulk facesMore... |
| `ModifyBalls[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the modify option for ball diametersMore... |
| `ModifyOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.RodThicknessBuilder.ModifyOptions` | Returns or sets the modify option for rod and ball diametersMore... |
| `ModifyRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the modify option for rod diametersMore... |
| `RodDiameter[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Fields.ScalarFieldWrapper` | Returns the diameter/thickness scalar field of the rods in the lattice graphMore... |
| `TessellationFactor[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tessellation factor of the lattice creation.More... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |

Represents a single object selection

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `GetValue(outNXOpen.Features.Featureselection, outNXOpen.Viewview, outNXOpen.Point3dpoint)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the object's view and point.More... |
| `GetValue(outNXOpen.InferSnapType.SnapTypesnapType, outNXOpen.Features.Featureselection1, outNXOpen.Viewview1, outNXOpen.Point3dpoint1, outNXOpen.Features.Featureselection2, outNXOpen.Viewview2, outNXOpen.Point3dpoint2)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the objects view and point and snap information.More... |
| `GetValue(outNXOpen.CaeObjectType.CaeSubTypecaeSubType, out int caeSubId)` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | The object being selected with CAE set object information.More... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.Features.Featureselection,NXOpen.Viewview,NXOpen.Point3dpoint)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the object's view and object's pointMore... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.InferSnapType.SnapTypesnapType,NXOpen.Features.Featureselection1,NXOpen.Viewview1,NXOpen.Point3dpoint1,NXOpen.Features.Featureselection2,NXOpen.Viewview2,NXOpen.Point3dpoint2)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with the objects view and objects point and snap information.More... |
| `SetValue(NXOpen.Features.Featureselection,NXOpen.CaeObjectType.CaeSubTypecaeSubType, int caeSubId)` | `unsafe void` | The object being selected with CAE set object information.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `Value[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns or sets the object being selectedMore... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `GetArray()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the list of objects in the selection list.More... |
| `GetSelectObjectArray()` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectObject[]` | Returns the list of SelectObjects in the selection list.More... |
| `Remove(NXOpen.Features.Feature@object)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified object from list.More... |

| `RemoveArray(NXOpen.Features.Feature[] objects)` | `unsafe bool` | Remove specified objects from list.More... |

Represents a Flange feature builder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `DeleteSketch()` | `unsafe void` | Delete the flange sketchMore... |
| `EditSketch()` | `unsafe void` | Edit the sketch base on a new edge you need to call SetEdge to set a new edgeMore... |
| `GetSketch()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Sketch` | Get the flange sketchMore... |
| `ValidateBuilderData()` | `unsafe int` | Verify that the builder data is valid for creating a flange.More... |
| `GetApplicationContext()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.ApplicationContext` | Get the application context.More... |
| `SetApplicationContext(NXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.ApplicationContextappContext)` | `unsafe void` | Set the application context.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| `BendOptions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.BendOptions` | Returns the bend options object.More... |
| `Edge[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Edge` | Returns or sets the edge on which the flange is created.More... |
| `FirstDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns a distance based onNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.WidthType.More... |
| `InsetType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.InsetTypeOptions` | Returns or sets the inset type (inside, outside, bendoutside) for the flange.More... |
| `Length[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the length of the flange.More... |
| `LengthType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.LengthTypeOptions` | Returns or sets a enum indicating the length type.More... |
| `MatchFaceOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.MatchFaceOptions` | Returns or sets the match face selection type.More... |
| `MatchPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the Match Plane.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset value for the flange.More... |
| `OffsetType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.OffsetTypeOptions` | Returns or sets the offset type for the flange.More... |
| `SecondDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns a distance based onNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.WidthType.More... |
| `Vertex[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Returns or sets the vertex on the flange edge, needed to dimension the flange width.More... |
| `WidthType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SheetMetal.FlangeBuilder.WidthTypeOptions` | Returns or sets the width type for flange.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.DeckBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a54160.html

This class is used to create or edit aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.Deckfeature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `CamberHeight[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the expression containing the difference in the height of the camber from the center of the ship to the hull intersections in the selected plane.More... |
| `CamberOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the expression containing the offset from the ends of the camber section in the selected plane to the start of the straight portion of the camber shape.More... |
| `CenterHeight[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the expression containing the overall height of the camber shape at the center of the ship in the selected plane.More... |
| `Hull[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBody` | Returns the sheet body that defines the hull shape.More... |
| `MoldFacePlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the plane in which the camber shape is generated.More... |
| `MoldFacePlaneList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilderList` | Returns the list of planes defined to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFacePlanes[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectDatumPlaneList` | Returns the planes selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces selected that defines the shape of the deck.More... |
| `MoldFaceSheet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBody` | Returns the sheet body selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.DeckBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the method used to define the mold face of the deck.More... |
| `BoundaryPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the plane defined to indicate the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the section containing curves that define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySheets[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the sheet bodies or datum planes selected, or a face collector used to define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset to apply to the selected mold face to produce the desired mold face.More... |
| `Primary[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction.More... |
| `PrimaryOnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction when the plate system is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ProjectionDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.ProjectionOptions` | Returns the direction used to project the boundary section curves onto the mold face.More... |
| `Regions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.RegionPointList` | Returns the regions selected from the sheet, that has the inscribed boundaries, to keep for the final plate system shape.More... |
| `Secondary1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary1OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `Secondary2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary2OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the Ship Names builder, used to assign names to the Plate Systems created.More... |
| `SplitKnuckleEdges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the split knuckle edges, which are used to create seam feature to split a plate system into plate subsystem.More... |
| `Stock[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder` | Returns the plate stock builder, used to define the plate material, grade, thickness, mass density, and thicken option.More... |
| `ThicknessDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ThicknessDirectionBuilder` | Returns the thickness direction builder, used to specify the thickness direction from the mold face.More... |
| `Tightness[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the tightness desired for the plate system.More... |
| `Weld[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Weld.CharacteristicsBuilder` | Returns the welding characteristics builder, used to assign welding characteristics to the outermost edges of a plate system.More... |
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance, in degrees, used to determine when angles are zero.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used to determine when distances are considered zero.More... |
| `OrientationAngleRule[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.FeatureParmsBuilder.OrientationAngleRuleTypes` | Returns or sets the angle rule to use when measuring angles.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |
