## NXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a54244.html

Represents aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementbuilder which is used to create or edit a edge reinforcement system feature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `BuildSolid[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the indication of whether to build a solid for the edge reinforcement or just the curve.More... |
| `CreateSeamsAtKnuckles[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates if seams are to be created or updated at knuckle locations.More... |
| `Edges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the edges to reinforce.More... |
| `EndCutEnd[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder.EndCutTypes` | Returns or sets the end cut to use at the end of the edge reinforcement system.More... |
| `EndCutStart[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder.EndCutTypes` | Returns or sets the end cut to use at the start of the edge reinforcement system.More... |
| `EndEndCut[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EndCutBuilder` | Returns the detailed end end cut.More... |
| `KnuckleLocationTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used to determine when knuckle locations are considered to be the same.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset used for the offset distance from anchor point.More... |
| `OrientationAngle[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the angle to use for the edge reinforcement orientation.More... |
| `OrientationDefinitionBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.OrientationDefinitionBuilder` | Returns the builder used to define the orientation for the edge reinforcement system.More... |
| `OrientationMethod[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder.OrientationMethods` | Returns or sets the method used to orient the edge reinforcement.More... |
| `OrientationVector[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the orientation vector when the orientation method isNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder.OrientationMethods.Vector.More... |
| `Reverse[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the indication if the default direction of the flange is reverse or not.More... |
| `ReverseAttachmentDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates if the attachment direction is reversed.More... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the Ship Names builder, used to assign names to the Edge Reinforcement Systems created.More... |
| `StartEndCut[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EndCutBuilder` | Returns the detailed start end cut.More... |
| `StockData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.StiffenerStockBuilder` | Returns the stock data used to define the stock information of the edge reinforcement.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.EdgeReinforcementBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the type of placement being used in the edge reinforcement definition.More... |
| `Weld[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Weld.CharacteristicsBuilder` | Returns the builder used to specify the welding characteristics for the edge reinforcement.More... |
| `Boundary1[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the collector containing the plate system, profile system, or datum plane that will be used to trim the first end of the generated profile system.More... |
| `Boundary1Plane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the defined plane that will be used to trim the first end of the generated profile system.More... |
| `Boundary2[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the collector containing the plate system, profile system, or datum plane that will be used to trim the second end of the generated profile system.More... |
| `Boundary2Plane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the defined plane that will be used to trim the second end of the generated profile system.More... |
| `BoundaryOneModified[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates if the boundary 1 has been modified.More... |

Represents aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ExcessMaterialbuilder

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `EndOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the end offset (only applicable for excess material with variable offsets, fitup and constant offset excess material will ignore this value)More... |
| `ExcessType[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the excess material label that specifies the manufacturing step for this feature.More... |
| `ExtendEndFace[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the extend end side face option (not applicable for fitup)More... |
| `ExtendStartFace[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the extend start side face option (not applicable for fitup)More... |
| `OffsetDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset distanceMore... |
| `OffsetType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ExcessMaterialBuilder.Offset` | Returns or sets the offset type (only applicable for excess material, fitup will ignore the offset type)More... |
| `SelectFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectFace` | Returns the selection face.More... |
| `SelectFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces that need to have excess material.More... |
| `StartOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the start offset (replaces the legacy offset distance property, and is used for both excess material and fitup)More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ExcessMaterialBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the feature type (ie excess material or fitup)More... |
| `Version[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ExcessMaterialBuilder.VersionID` | Returns the version of the feature (used to determine which properties and methods are applicable) during edit.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |

| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a54360.html

This class is used to create or edit aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.GenericPlateSystemfeature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `MoldFacePlaneList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilderList` | Returns the list of planes defined to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFacePlanes[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectDatumPlaneList` | Returns the planes selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces selected that defines the shape of the generic plate.More... |
| `MoldFaceSheet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBody` | Returns the sheet body selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.GenericPlateSystemBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the method used to define the mold face of the generic plate system.More... |
| `BoundaryPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the plane defined to indicate the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the section containing curves that define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySheets[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the sheet bodies or datum planes selected, or a face collector used to define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset to apply to the selected mold face to produce the desired mold face.More... |
| `Primary[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction.More... |
| `PrimaryOnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction when the plate system is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ProjectionDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.ProjectionOptions` | Returns the direction used to project the boundary section curves onto the mold face.More... |
| `Regions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.RegionPointList` | Returns the regions selected from the sheet, that has the inscribed boundaries, to keep for the final plate system shape.More... |
| `Secondary1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary1OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `Secondary2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary2OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the Ship Names builder, used to assign names to the Plate Systems created.More... |
| `SplitKnuckleEdges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the split knuckle edges, which are used to create seam feature to split a plate system into plate subsystem.More... |
| `Stock[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder` | Returns the plate stock builder, used to define the plate material, grade, thickness, mass density, and thicken option.More... |
| `ThicknessDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ThicknessDirectionBuilder` | Returns the thickness direction builder, used to specify the thickness direction from the mold face.More... |
| `Tightness[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the tightness desired for the plate system.More... |
| `Weld[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Weld.CharacteristicsBuilder` | Returns the welding characteristics builder, used to assign welding characteristics to the outermost edges of a plate system.More... |
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance, in degrees, used to determine when angles are zero.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used to determine when distances are considered zero.More... |
| `OrientationAngleRule[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.FeatureParmsBuilder.OrientationAngleRuleTypes` | Returns or sets the angle rule to use when measuring angles.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `BoundarySection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the section containing curves that define the boundary of the plate system.More... |

| `PrimaryOnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction when the plate system is located on a midship reference.More... |

| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the distance tolerance.More... |
| `FacePlaneBoundary[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ExpressionCollectorSetList` | Returns the face, plane boundary, which defines a list of trimming objects with offset values.More... |
| `FlipDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flip direction, which can change the plate thickness direction.More... |
| `MergeRegions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBodyList` | Returns the multiple regions to merge together as plate body.More... |
| `MoldFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the mold face, which is used to create the plate body and define the plate placement.More... |
| `MoldFaceOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the mold face offset, which defines an offset distance to the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFacePlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the mold face plane, which is used to create the plate body and define the plate placement.More... |
| `MoldFacePlaneValid[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the mold face plane, which is selected to create plate or not.More... |
| `MoldFaceSheet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBodyList` | Returns the mold face sheet body, which is used to create the plate body and define the plate placement.More... |
| `PlaneBoundaryList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilderList` | Returns the list of plane builders as plate boundaries.More... |
| `PlateBoundaryOptionList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateBoundaryOptionBuilderList` | Returns the build boundary option builder listMore... |
| `PlateStock[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder` | Returns the plate stock builder, which defines the plate material, grade, thickness, mass density, thicken option and opposite thickness.More... |
| `ProjectDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.ProjectionOptions` | Returns the project direction, which is used to project the boundary curves to the plate mold face.More... |
| `RegionOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateBuilder.RegionOptions` | Returns or sets the region option, which defines the plate areas in case of body faces as plate boundary.More... |
| `RegionPoint[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Returns or sets the region point, which is used to identify the plate region.More... |
| `Regions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the regions to create platesMore... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the ship name builder.More... |
| `SplitKnuckleEdges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectEdgeList` | Returns the split knuckle edges, which are used to split a plate into separate knuckle parts.More... |
| `Tightness[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateBuilder.TightnessOptions` | Returns or sets the tightness, which defines the plate is tight (air tight, oil tight, water tight) or non tight.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the plate type, which is creation or adoption.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |

| `RemovePart(string partName)` | `unsafe void` | Remove the part from the collection of parts to be unformed and scaled.More... |

| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |

| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|

| `OppositeThickness[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the opposite thickness.More... |
| `RestrictThicknessToMaterial[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates if thickness specification should be restricted to that defined in the material data base.More... |
| `ThickenOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder.ThickenOptions` | Returns or sets the thicken option.More... |
| `Thickness[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the thickness.More... |

| `ThicknessSourceOption[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder.ThicknessSourceOptions` | Returns or sets the thickness source option.More... |
| `ThicknessStr[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the thickness in string format.More... |
| `WeightRating[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the weight rating, which is defined together with material data and has one to one relationship to the thickness.More... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder

This class is used to create or edit the information shared between all the Basic Design plate system features in the Ship Design application

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CleanUpTemporaryCurves()` | `unsafe void` | Cleans up the temp curves.More... |
| `CreateRegionBody()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Body` | Create the region body that has the inscribed boundaries.More... |
| `DeletePreviewBody(bool bDelete)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the preview body.More... |
| `DeleteRegionBody()` | `unsafe void` | Delete the current region body.More... |
| `SetKnuckleEdges(NXOpen.TaggedObject[] knuckleEdges)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the knuckle edges, which includes edges for both bend and split types.More... |
| `SetPreviewOption(bool bPreview)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the preview option.More... |
| `SetRegionIndex(int [] indexArray)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the region index.More... |
| `SetRegionPoints(NXOpen.Point3d[] regionPoints)` | `unsafe void` | Set the points derived from the regions of the sheet, that has the inscribed boundaries, to keep for the final plate system shape.More... |
| `SetSplitEdgeUpdateFlag(bool isSplitEdgeUpdate)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the flag to indicate that split knuckle edges are out of date and need to update.More... |
| `CreatePlaneForList()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilder` | Create aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilderto add a defined plane to a list.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `BoundaryPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the plane defined to indicate the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the section containing curves that define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySheets[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the sheet bodies or datum planes selected, or a face collector used to define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset to apply to the selected mold face to produce the desired mold face.More... |
| `Primary[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction.More... |
| `PrimaryOnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction when the plate system is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ProjectionDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.ProjectionOptions` | Returns the direction used to project the boundary section curves onto the mold face.More... |
| `Regions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.RegionPointList` | Returns the regions selected from the sheet, that has the inscribed boundaries, to keep for the final plate system shape.More... |
| `Secondary1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary1OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `Secondary2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary2OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the Ship Names builder, used to assign names to the Plate Systems created.More... |
| `SplitKnuckleEdges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the split knuckle edges, which are used to create seam feature to split a plate system into plate subsystem.More... |
| `Stock[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder` | Returns the plate stock builder, used to define the plate material, grade, thickness, mass density, and thicken option.More... |
| `ThicknessDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ThicknessDirectionBuilder` | Returns the thickness direction builder, used to specify the thickness direction from the mold face.More... |
| `Tightness[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the tightness desired for the plate system.More... |
| `Weld[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Weld.CharacteristicsBuilder` | Returns the welding characteristics builder, used to assign welding characteristics to the outermost edges of a plate system.More... |
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance, in degrees, used to determine when angles are zero.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used to determine when distances are considered zero.More... |
| `OrientationAngleRule[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.FeatureParmsBuilder.OrientationAngleRuleTypes` | Returns or sets the angle rule to use when measuring angles.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ProfileSystemBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a54760.html

This class is used to create or edit the information shared between all the Basic Design profile system features in the Ship Design application

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CreatePathCurves(outNXOpen.NXObject[] curves)` | `unsafe void` | Creates path curves for all the paths of the profile system.More... |
| `CreatOrientationPathCurve()` | `unsafe void` | Creates the orientation path curves.More... |
| `DeleteLastPathCurves()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the path curves returned from a call toGetLastPathCurves.More... |
| `DeletePathCurves()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the path curves created from a call toCreatePathCurves.More... |
| `GetLastPathCurves(outNXOpen.NXObject[] curves)` | `unsafe void` | Gets the path curves used byNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.OrientationDefinitionBuilder.More... |
| `SetBoundaryOnePoints(NXOpen.Point3d[] points)` | `unsafe void` | Sets the selected intersection points for the first boundary.More... |

| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |

| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |

| `OffsetSpacing[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the distance between generated planes.More... |

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `MoldFacePlaneList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlaneListBuilderList` | Returns the list of planes defined to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFacePlanes[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectDatumPlaneList` | Returns the planes selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `MoldFaces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces selected that defines the shape of the transverse bulkhead.More... |
| `MoldFaceSheet[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectBody` | Returns the sheet body selected to define the mold face.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.TransverseBulkheadBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the method used to define the mold face of the transverse bulkhead.More... |
| `BoundaryPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the plane defined to indicate the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the section containing curves that define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `BoundarySheets[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the sheet bodies or datum planes selected, or a face collector used to define the boundary of the plate system.More... |
| `Offset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset to apply to the selected mold face to produce the desired mold face.More... |
| `Primary[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction.More... |
| `PrimaryOnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the primary stiffener direction when the plate system is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ProjectionDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.ProjectionOptions` | Returns the direction used to project the boundary section curves onto the mold face.More... |
| `Regions[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.RegionPointList` | Returns the regions selected from the sheet, that has the inscribed boundaries, to keep for the final plate system shape.More... |
| `Secondary1[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary1OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `Secondary2[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange.More... |
| `Secondary2OnReference[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateSystemBuilder.StiffenerDirectionType` | Returns or sets the direction of the stiffener flange when the stiffener is located on a midship reference.More... |
| `ShipNames[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ShipNamesBuilder` | Returns the Ship Names builder, used to assign names to the Plate Systems created.More... |
| `SplitKnuckleEdges[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectNXObjectList` | Returns the split knuckle edges, which are used to create seam feature to split a plate system into plate subsystem.More... |
| `Stock[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.PlateStockBuilder` | Returns the plate stock builder, used to define the plate material, grade, thickness, mass density, and thicken option.More... |
| `ThicknessDirection[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ThicknessDirectionBuilder` | Returns the thickness direction builder, used to specify the thickness direction from the mold face.More... |
| `Tightness[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the tightness desired for the plate system.More... |
| `Weld[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Weld.CharacteristicsBuilder` | Returns the welding characteristics builder, used to assign welding characteristics to the outermost edges of a plate system.More... |
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance, in degrees, used to determine when angles are zero.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the tolerance used to determine when distances are considered zero.More... |
| `OrientationAngleRule[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.FeatureParmsBuilder.OrientationAngleRuleTypes` | Returns or sets the angle rule to use when measuring angles.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ValidateModelBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a55236.html

This is to create aNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.ValidateModelBuilderwhich is used to validate Basic Design Structures

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `CheckCircularReference[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to search circular reference for basic model.More... |
| `CheckKnuckleStiffener[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option that determines whether or not to search unsplit knuckled stiffeners which are not allowed to be bent.More... |
| `CheckPlateIntersectedPlate[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to search plate intersected plate in case there is no intersection seam with split on.More... |
| `CheckPlateIntersectedStiffener[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to search stiffener intersected plate in case there is no profile cutout.More... |
| `CheckStiffenerIntersectedStiffener[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to search stiffener intersected stiffener in case there is interference of two stiffener bodies.More... |
| `CheckThickenPlate[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to thicken mold face to check plate.More... |
| `CreateTransientStructures[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option that determines whether or not to create transient structures.More... |
| `SelectPart[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.ShipDesign.SelectPartBuilder` | Returns the ship basic design partMore... |
| `ShowHD3DReport[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to show HD3D report.More... |
| `ShowPlateThicknessDirection[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not to show plate thickness direction.More... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

Represents aFeatures.StructureDesign.BoltedConnectionbuilder

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `ExecuteRule()` | `unsafe bool` | Executes the rule to update the bolted plate stock data.More... |
| `GetGussetConnectionBuilders(outNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.GussetConnectionBuilder[] gussetConnectionBuilders)` | `unsafe void` | Get gusset connection builders.More... |
| `UpdateStockSectionTypes(bool sectionModified)` | `unsafe void` | Update stock section types by user input.More... |
| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `HideInternalParentFeatureAfterEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Re-suppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) after it has been edited.More... |
| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

| `SpliceConnectionSubType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.BoltedConnectionBuilder.SpliceConnectionSubTypes` | Returns or sets an option to indicate the sub type of splice bolted connection.More... |
| `StockData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.FeatureSpreadsheetBuilder` | Returns the stock data.More... |
| `XOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the x offsetMore... |
| `YOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the y offsetMore... |

| `SetParamtersChanged(bool bChanged)` | `unsafe void` | Sets member end parameters changedMore... |

Represents a builder which is used to create or edit a Structure Design Haunch feature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AlignmentType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.GussetBuilder.AlignmentTypes` | Returns or sets the alignment type to be used to locate haunchMore... |
| `AngularTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the angular tolerance (degrees)More... |
| `AttachmentFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the attachment face to be used at locate haunchMore... |
| `AttachmentPointNormal[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Vector3d` | Returns or sets the pick point normal on attachment face.More... |
| `ContextAttribute[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.ContextAttributeBuilder` | Returns the context attribute builderMore... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the distance tolerance (part units)More... |
| `FaceOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the stiffening plate offset.More... |
| `GussetData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.FeatureSpreadsheetBuilder` | Returns the stock data used to define the stock information of the haunch.More... |
| `HaunchName[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the haunch nameMore... |
| `OffsetDistance[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the offset to the alignment plane in haunch plate type.More... |
| `OrientVector[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Direction` | Returns or sets the orientation vectorMore... |
| `PickPointOnAttachment[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Returns or sets the pick point on attachment face.More... |
| `PickPointOnReinforcement[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point3d` | Returns or sets the pick point on reinforcement face.More... |
| `PositionType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.GussetBuilder.PositionTypes` | Returns or sets the position to be used to locate originMore... |
| `ReinforcementFace[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the reinforcement face to be used at locate haunchMore... |
| `ReinforcementPointNormal[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Vector3d` | Returns or sets the pick point normal on reinforcement face.More... |
| `ReverseAlignEdge[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag to specify whether the haunch align edge direction is reversed or not.More... |
| `ReverseFlange[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag to specify whether the haunch offset distance direction is reversed or not.More... |
| `ReverseStiffeningOnFace[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag to specify whether the haunch stiffening face is reversed or not.More... |
| `StiffeningPlateData[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.FeatureSpreadsheetBuilder` | Returns the stock data used to define the stock information of the stiffening plate.More... |
| `StiffeningPlatePlacementMethod[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.HaunchBuilder.PlacementMethods` | Returns or sets the stiffening plate placement method typeMore... |
| `ThicknessType[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.StructureDesign.GussetBuilder.ThicknessTypes` | Returns or sets the direction to be used to thicken the gusset plateMore... |
| `XOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the x offset.More... |
| `YOffset[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the y offset.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `SetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the parent features which would be internal or slaves to the feature being created or commitedMore... |
| `ShowInternalParentFeatureForEdit(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress an internal parent feature (a slave feature) so it can be edited.More... |
| `UnsetParentFeatureInternal(NXOpen.Features.FeatureparentFeature)` | `unsafe void` | Set the internal parent feature of the feature being edited to externalMore... |

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |

| `CommitFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Commits the feature parameters and creates the featureMore... |
| `GetFeature()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns the feature currently being edited by this builder.More... |

| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |

| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |

| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.UnitCellEditorBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a56108.html

The unit cell editor allows an application to create, store and edit a lattice unit cell

### 方法

| 方法名 | 返回类型 | 说明 |
|--------|----------|------|
| `CreateSnapHandles()` | `unsafe void` | Journaling for the Creation of Snap HandlesMore... |
| `CreateWorkingCube()` | `unsafe void` | Create the working cube to view the space where the unit cell must be defined.More... |
| `Open(NXOpen.Sectionsection)` | `unsafe int` | Open an existing unit cell fileMore... |
| `Save()` | `unsafe void` | Save the unit cell file using the file name registered in this builderMore... |
| `Commit()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Commits any edits that have been applied to the builder.More... |
| `Destroy()` | `unsafe void` | Deletes the builder, and cleans up any objects created by the builder.More... |
| `GetCommittedObjects()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | For builders that create more than one object, this method returns the objects that are created by commit.More... |
| `GetObject()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject` | Returns the object currently being edited by this builder.More... |
| `ShowResults()` | `unsafe void` | Updates the model to reflect the result of an edit to the model for all builders that support showing results.More... |
| `Validate()` | `unsafe bool` | Validate whether the inputs to the component are sufficient for commit to be called.More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `PrintTestData(String variableName, int lineNumber)` | `void` | <exclude>More... |
| `ToString()` | `override string` | Returns a String that represents the current Object.More... |
| `AsyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg,IMessageSinkreplySink)` | `IMessageCtrl` | Asynchronously processes the given message.More... |
| `SyncProcessMessage(IMessage msg)` | `IMessage` | Synchronously processes the given message.More... |

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `CellCountX[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of unit cells to display along X axis when show pattern is ONMore... |
| `CellCountY[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of unit cells to display along Y axis when show pattern is ONMore... |
| `CellCountZ[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of unit cells to display along Z axis when show pattern is ONMore... |
| `FileBrowser[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the unit cell file name to open or saveMore... |
| `GridLineCount[get, set]` | `unsafe int` | Returns or sets the number of grid lines on the 6 faces of the working cube when show grid is ONMore... |
| `KeepRods[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets an option to keep all the curves in the part when opening a unit cell fileMore... |
| `RodDiameter[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the unit cell rod diameterMore... |
| `RodItemList[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.GeometricUtilities.RodItemListBuilder` | Returns a rod item listMore... |
| `ShowGrid[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets an option to display grid lines on all 6 faces of the working cubeMore... |
| `ShowPattern[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets an option to show the unit cell patternMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

| `ChangeBooleanType()` | `unsafe void` | Change Boolean TypeMore... |
| `DeleteClueAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all clue alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteHintAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all clue alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteInformationalAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all informational alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `DeleteWarningAlerts()` | `unsafe void` | Delete all warning alerts from the featuresMore... |
| `GetAllChildren()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns all immediate child features.More... |
| `GetBodies()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Body[]` | Returns the bodies created by the featureMore... |
| `GetChildren()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the immediate child features.More... |
| `GetEdges()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Edge[]` | Returns the edges created by the featureMore... |
| `GetEntities()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXObject[]` | Returns the entities created by a feature that are not Bodies, Faces or Edges.More... |
| `GetExpressions()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression[]` | Returns the expressions created by the feature.More... |
| `GetFaces()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Face[]` | Returns the faces created by the featureMore... |
| `GetFeatureClueHintMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns both clue and hint messages of the feature.More... |
| `GetFeatureClueMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature clue messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureColor()` | `unsafeNXOpen.NXColor` | The feature colorMore... |
| `GetFeatureErrorMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature error messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureHintMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature hint messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureInformationalMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature informational messages.More... |
| `GetFeatureName()` | `unsafe string` | Returns the displayed name of the feature.More... |
| `GetFeatureWarningMessages()` | `unsafe string []` | Returns the feature warning messages.More... |
| `GetParents()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature[]` | Returns the immediate parent features.More... |
| `GetSections()` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section[]` | Queries a feature for list of its sections.More... |
| `HideBody()` | `unsafe void` | Hide the body created by the featureMore... |
| `HideParents()` | `unsafe void` | Hide the body created by the parent featureMore... |
| `Highlight()` | `unsafe void` | Highlight the body created by the featureMore... |
| `IsBrowsableFeature()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns true if a feature is browsable.More... |
| `IsOutOfDate()` | `unsafe bool` | Returns true if a feature is out of date.More... |
| `LoadParentPart()` | `unsafe void` | Loads parent part for linked featureMore... |
| `LogDiagnostic(int errorCode, string message,NXOpen.Features.Feature.DiagnosticTypediagnosticType)` | `unsafe void` | Log a diagnostic alert for this featureMore... |
| `MakeCurrentFeature()` | `unsafe void` | Make current featureMore... |
| `MakeSketchExternal()` | `unsafe void` | Make the parent sketch external for reuse by other features.More... |
| `MakeSketchInternal()` | `unsafe void` | Make the parent sketch internal if referenced only by this feature.More... |
| `RemoveForEdit(bool dependent)` | `unsafe void` | Remove all the feature faces before a NoHistory mode edit.More... |
| `RemoveParameters()` | `unsafe void` | Remove Local feature parameters in history free mode.More... |
| `SetGroupActive(bool active)` | `unsafe void` | Set a feature group as active group.More... |
| `ShowBody(bool moveCurves)` | `unsafe void` | Show the body created by the feature.More... |
| `ShowDimensions()` | `unsafe void` | Show all feature dimensions of a feature.More... |
| `ShowParents(bool moveCurves)` | `unsafe void` | Show the body created by the parent feature.More... |
| `Suppress()` | `unsafe void` | Suppress the featureMore... |
| `Unhighlight()` | `unsafe void` | Unhighlight the body created by the featureMore... |
| `Unsuppress()` | `unsafe void` | Unsuppress the featureMore... |

| `DeleteAllAttributesByType(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes all attributes of a specific type.More... |
| `DeleteAllAttributesByType(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes all attributes of a specific type with the option to update or not.More... |
| `DeleteAttributeByTypeAndTitle(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype, string title)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes an attribute by type and title.More... |
| `DeleteAttributeByTypeAndTitle(NXOpen.NXObject.AttributeTypetype, string title,NXOpen.Update.Optionoption)` | `unsafe void` | Deletes an attribute by type and title with the option to update or not.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.VehicleDesign.GlazingShadeBandsBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a56420.html

Represents aNXOpen.Features.VehicleDesign.GlazingShadeBandsBuilderused to create or edit a vehicle designNXOpen.Features.VehicleDesign.GlazingShadeBandsfeature

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `EyeFeature[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.Feature` | Returns or sets the eyellipse feature.More... |
| `Eyellipse[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.SelectFeature` | Returns the selected eyellipse feature.More... |
| `EyellipsePercentile[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.VehicleDesign.GlazingShadeBandsBuilder.EyePercentile` | Returns or sets theNXOpen.Features.VehicleDesign.GlazingShadeBandsBuilder.EyePercentilefor the eyellipse percentile to be used.More... |
| `FixedSideGlazing[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not the glazing shade band curves on the fixed side windows should be created.More... |
| `ForwardGlazing[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not the glazing shade band curves on the forward windshield should be created.More... |
| `ForwardGlazingGeometry[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns or sets the forward glazing geometry specified by user.More... |
| `Loading[get, set]` | `unsafe string` | Returns or sets the name of the used loading.More... |
| `RearGlazing[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not the glazing shade band curves on the rear window (backlight) should be created.More... |
| `RearGlazingGeometry[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns or sets the rear glazing geometry specified by user.More... |
| `SideGlazingGeometry[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns or sets the fixed side glazing geometry specified by user.More... |
| `UpperPoint[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Point` | Returns or sets the upper boundary point specified by user to define the rear view height.More... |
| `UseStandardLoading[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option to indicate if the loading specified by the standard will be used.More... |
| `UseViewHeight[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the option determines whether or not the upper boundary of the field of view through the inside rear view mirror should be considered when generating glazing shade band curves on the rear window.More... |
| `ViewHeight[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the value of the rear view height.More... |
| `ViewHeightExp[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the expression of the rear view height.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |

## NXOpen.Features.WrapBuilder

> 原始文档: https://docs.sw.siemens.com/documentation/external/PL20221117716122093/en-US/nx_api/nx/2306/nx_api/en-US/nxopen_net/a56836.html

Represents aNXOpen.Features.WrapUnwrapbuilder

### 属性

| 属性名 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|
| `AngleTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the angle tolerance used to determine the sampling of the curve during processing, and the accuracy of the output.More... |
| `Associative[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets the flag that indicates during creation if a feature is to be created or just the curves, true indicates a feature will be created.More... |
| `Curves[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Section` | Returns the curves that are being wrapped or unwrapped.More... |
| `CutLineAngle[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Expression` | Returns the angle, measured from the point of tangency of the plane and the faces, at which curves will be split during the wrapping operation.More... |
| `DistanceTolerance[get, set]` | `unsafe double` | Returns or sets the distance tolerance used to determine the sampling of the curve during processing, and the accuracy of the output.More... |
| `Faces[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.ScCollector` | Returns the faces that the curves are being unwrapped from or wrapped to.More... |
| `Plane[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.SelectISurface` | Returns the planar face or datum plane that the curves are being wrapped from or unwrapped to.More... |
| `SpecifyPlane[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Plane` | Returns or sets the specified plane that the curves are being wrapped from or unwrapped to.More... |
| `Type[get, set]` | `unsafeNXOpen.Features.WrapBuilder.Types` | Returns or sets the type of operation being performed.More... |
| `ParentFeatureInternal[get, set]` | `unsafe bool` | Returns or sets whether or not the latest timestamped parent feature of this feature should be made internalMore... |
| `PreviewBuilder[get]` | `unsafeNXOpen.PreviewBuilder` | Returns the preview builder subobject.More... |
| `Tag[get]` | `Tag` | Returns the tag of this object.More... |
| `NextSink[get]` | `IMessageSink` | Gets the next message sink in the sink chain.More... |


---
